options: Perform similar/related categories of tasks selected by a flag
Have absolutely no relationship at all
Pass output directly as input to each other
Operate on the same single data item

question: Coincidental cohesion is considered the weakest type of cohesion because the elements are grouped?
options: With no meaningful relationship at all

question: Sequential cohesion exists when the output of one element in a module serves as?
options: Input to the next element within the same module
Input to an unrelated external module
A global variable for the entire system

question: Communicational cohesion occurs when elements within a module?
options: Operate on the same input or output data
Are executed at the same time of day
